masked_case_json.world_change: a dominant consumer-search and advertising incumbent traded under a disruption narrative: investors feared that ai-native interfaces would erode query behavior and the ad model. the company’s subsequent primary-source update showed core search usage and monetization still growing, cloud demand accelerating, and internal model quality/cost improving, contradicting the simple “incumbent is obsolete” narrative.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Underlying: Alphabet. Primary source: Alphabet Q1 2026 earnings call and investor materials, which reported continued Search growth, Cloud acceleration, strong AI usage, and lower AI response costs. Outcome check: subsequent earnings/operating metrics refuted the feared near-term collapse of the core ad engine. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
